mapper.sql:
WHERE sm.schedule_status = 'Y'
AND sm.schedule_visibility IN ('Y', 'M')
AND sm.schedule_visibility = 'Y'
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no
AND l.addr1 LIKE '%서울%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%부산%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%대구%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%인천%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%광주%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%대전%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%울산%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%세종%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%경기%' AND l.addr1 LIKE '%강원%' AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%충청북%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%충북%') AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%충청남%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%충남%') AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%전라북%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%전북%') AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%전라남%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%전남%') AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%경상북%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%경북%') AND (l.addr1 LIKE '%경상남%' OR l.addr1 LIKE '%경남%') AND l.addr1 LIKE '%제주%'
)
AND (sm.schedule_title LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%' OR m.nickname LIKE '%' || #{searchInput} || '%')
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_main sm JOIN member m ON sm.member_no = m.member_no

SELECT sm.schedule_no, sm.schedule_title, TO_CHAR(sm.schedule_startdate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') AS scheduleStartdate, TO_CHAR(sm.schedule_enddate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') AS scheduleEnddate, sm.schedule_visibility, sm.create_date AS createDate, sm.member_no, m.nickname AS memberNickname,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_sub ss WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no) AS placeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nice n WHERE n.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND n.post_board_fx = 'SR') AS likeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND r.post_board = 'S' AND r.status = 'Y') AS replyCount,
(SELECT l.firstimage FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstImage,
(SELECT l.content_type_id FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstContentTypeId,
(SELECT l.title FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstTitle,
(SELECT l.addr1 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstAddr,
(SELECT LISTAGG(l.mapx || ',' || l.mapy, ';') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_seq) FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no AND l.mapx IS NOT NULL AND l.mapy IS NOT NULL AND ss.schedule_sub_date = ( SELECT MIN(schedule_sub_date) FROM schedule_sub WHERE schedule_no = sm.schedule_no )) AS coords
FROM schedule_main sm JOIN member m ON sm.member_no = m.member_no
ORDER BY sm.create_date DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT sm.schedule_no, sm.schedule_title, sm.schedule_startdate, sm.schedule_enddate, sm.create_date AS createDate, sm.member_no, m.nickname AS memberNickname,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_sub ss WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no) AS placeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nice n WHERE n.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND n.post_board_fx = 'SR') AS likeCount,
(SELECT l.addr1 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstAddr,
(SELECT LISTAGG(l.mapx || ',' || l.mapy, ';') WITHIN GROUP (ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq) FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no AND l.mapx IS NOT NULL AND l.mapy IS NOT NULL) AS coords
FROM schedule_main sm JOIN member m ON sm.member_no = m.member_no WHERE sm.schedule_no = #{scheduleNo}

SELECT ss.schedule_sub_date AS subDate, ss.schedule_sub_seq AS subSeq, l.title, l.addr1, l.mapx AS mapX, l.mapy AS mapY FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = #{scheduleNo} ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nice n JOIN schedule_main sm ON n.post_no = sm.schedule_no WHERE n.member_no = #{memberNo} AND n.post_board_fx = 'SJ' AND sm.schedule_status = 'Y'

SELECT sm.schedule_no, sm.schedule_title, TO_CHAR(sm.schedule_startdate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') AS scheduleStartdate, TO_CHAR(sm.schedule_enddate, 'yyyy.mm.dd') AS scheduleEnddate, sm.schedule_visibility, sm.create_date AS createDate, sm.member_no, m.nickname AS memberNickname,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM schedule_sub ss WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no) AS placeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nice n_like WHERE n_like.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND n_like.post_board_fx = 'SR') AS likeCount,
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reply r WHERE r.post_no = sm.schedule_no AND r.post_board = 'S' AND r.status = 'Y') AS replyCount,
(SELECT l.firstimage2 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstImage,
(SELECT l.content_type_id FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstContentTypeId,
(SELECT l.title FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstTitle,
(SELECT l.addr1 FROM schedule_sub ss JOIN landmark l ON l.content_id = ss.content_id WHERE ss.schedule_no = sm.schedule_no ORDER BY ss.schedule_sub_date, ss.schedule_sub_seq FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY) AS firstAddr
FROM nice n JOIN schedule_main sm ON n.post_no = sm.schedule_no JOIN member m ON sm.member_no = m.member_no WHERE n.member_no = #{memberNo} AND n.post_board_fx = 'SJ' AND sm.schedule_status = 'Y' ORDER BY n.nice_no DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT S.SCHEDULE_NO) FROM SCHEDULE_MAIN S LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE_SUB SS ON S.SCHEDULE_NO = SS.SCHEDULE_NO LEFT JOIN LANDMARK L ON SS.CONTENT_ID = L.CONTENT_ID WHERE S.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND S.SCHEDULE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND S.SCHEDULE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (L.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND ( S.SCHEDULE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )

SELECT DISTINCT S.SCHEDULE_NO, S.SCHEDULE_TITLE AS scheduleTitle, S.SCHEDULE_STATUS, S.CREATE_DATE AS createDate, RP.REPORT_STATUS FROM SCHEDULE_MAIN S LEFT JOIN REPORT RP ON S.SCHEDULE_NO = RP.TARGET_NO AND RP.TARGET_TYPE = 'share' AND RP.REPORT_STATUS = 'N' LEFT JOIN SCHEDULE_SUB SS ON S.SCHEDULE_NO = SS.SCHEDULE_NO LEFT JOIN LANDMARK L ON SS.CONTENT_ID = L.CONTENT_ID
WHERE S.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo} AND S.SCHEDULE_STATUS = 'Y'
AND S.SCHEDULE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
AND (L.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND ( S.SCHEDULE_TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.TITLE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR L.ADDR1 LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' )
ORDER BY S.SCHEDULE_NO DESC OFFSET #{startRow} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{listLimit} ROWS ONLY
